benefits.description: Hit and miss for libido improvement

protocol_notes: Currently on anabolics at moderate doses. Has used PT-141 and PT-141 (considering). Also currently on testosterone and other AAS (mentions being on 'a lot more than testosterone'). Mentions Deca has not done much for sensitivity but larger 3-500mcg doses are great for erections. Has tried HCG (no effect). Using amphetamine-based stimulants regularly but issue predates their use. Tried cannabis but binge eating issue prevents use. Issue has persisted across different hormone levels (both high and low E2), with and without anabolics. Last bloodwork 4 weeks before latest mention, E2 within normal range on higher end, prolactin middle of normal range. Getting new bloods done. Issue is long-standing (YEARS), not related to attraction or partners.
